items.quote: I want to thank you so much for presenting us that life changing conversation. I felt an immediate difference in my life after hearing you speak. There are many things you taught that are so true but I've never realized before.
items.name: Skyler Adelson

items.quote: Many of the students take lessons that they will use in the future. Some of these students have also become so moved that they will stay after class to have a personal discussion with him.
items.name: Lyle T.

items.quote: I really enjoyed the presentation, it really made me think about the different choices I made and the different choices I will be making towards my lifetime goal.
items.name: Kamarie Johnson
